description: CompositionBlue Dri-Fit polyester tee with raglan sleeves, wide V-neck and nike heat transfer swooshFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean Complete your girl-next-door look with this black t-shirt, detailed with a broad front V-neck and short sleeves. Wear it when playing a game of tennis or just team it with a pair of casuals or a skirt for that youthful look.
